# WAKE SOLUTIONS

> Technology infrastructure and clinic software (WAKE Health) for businesses and medical practices across Honduras, Latin America, and the United States.

WAKE SOLUTIONS builds operational technology: automation, systematization, and software. WAKE Health is the clinic management product (patients, scheduling, clinical records, billing).

## Primary pages

- [Home (ES)](https://wake.solutions/): Corporate site in Spanish
- [Home (EN)](https://wake.solutions/en): Corporate site in English
- [WAKE Health (ES)](https://wake.solutions/health): Clinic software product page
- [WAKE Health (EN)](https://wake.solutions/en/health): Clinic software product page (EN)
- [Blog (ES)](https://wake.solutions/blog): Guides on clinic systems and tech solutions
- [Blog (EN)](https://wake.solutions/en/blog): Same blog in English
- [Legal (ES)](https://wake.solutions/legal): Terms, privacy, refund policy
- [Legal (EN)](https://wake.solutions/en/legal): Legal policies in English
